articles.title: Mass. family, Worcester woman identified as victims in deadly Virginia bus crash
articles.description:
The victims included a Greenfield couple and their two children, as well as a 25-year-old Worcester woman.

The post Mass. family, Worcester woman identified as victims in deadly Virginia bus crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A Greenfield couple and their two children died in a Virginia bus crash.
The crash also claimed the life of a 25-year-old Worcester woman.
This tragedy highlights the risks of travel for Massachusetts families.
